dependencies: Reliance on third-party service providers for certain functions
Dependence on financial institutions for clearing services and sponsorship
Reliance on payment networks (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, UnionPay International)
Dependence on technology infrastructure and telecommunications networks
risks: Third-party system failures could interrupt service
Supply chain disruptions affecting hardware and infrastructure suppliers
Vendor cybersecurity incidents could affect ability to service customers
Loss of financial institution sponsorship could prevent processing services
Concentration risk with financial institutions for cash deposits

regulatory_risks: Dodd-Frank Act restrictions on debit card interchange fees
Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) oversight and potential systemic risk designation
Federal Financial Institutions Examination Council (FFIEC) examinations
Payment institution licensing requirements in Europe (Poland, Greece, Germany, Spain, Malta, Czech Republic, UK)
Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA) requirements effective January 2025
EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) compliance
Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act (GLBA) requirements
California Privacy Rights Act and state privacy laws
Anti-money laundering regulations (Bank Secrecy Act, USA PATRIOT Act)
Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) sanctions compliance
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) and UK Bribery Act compliance
State wage payment laws governing payroll card programs
Earned wage access regulations
Escheat laws for unclaimed property
Fair Debt Collection Practices Act (FDCPA)
Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA)
Telephone Consumer Protection Act (TCPA)
PCI Data Security Standard (PCI DSS) compliance
EU Artificial Intelligence Regulation
OECD Pillar Two Global Anti-Base Erosion Model Rules (15% minimum tax)
Data localization requirements in EU and Asia-Pacific
Potential federal privacy law in the United States
SEC climate-related disclosure rules (currently stayed pending judicial review)
European Sustainability Reporting Standards and Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
California climate-related disclosure bills
Interchange fee legislation limiting application to portions of transactions
Card network rules and standards changes
Foreign investment restrictions and economic sanctions

sanction_risks: OFAC sanctions prohibiting transactions with certain countries, individuals or entities
Risk of action by US or foreign governments restricting business in foreign countries
Potential material adverse effect from political or military conflict
Sold Merchant Solutions business in Russia in April 2022 due to geopolitical conditions
Exposure to international sanctions, embargoes, tariffs
